author: Max
description: Sync your vault to Spectacles AR glasses to explore your notes as a 3D knowledge graph. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: r3d5
releases.description: Initial release of Spectacles Sync. Syncs your Obsidian vault as an end-to-end encrypted knowledge graph to a Spectacles AR Lens, paired with a password.
